name: Toddler Mermaid Kids' Comforter - Pillowfort™: Multicolor Cotton, Polyester Fill, OEKO-TEX Certified, 58"x42"
description: Bring a fun mermaid theme to their bedroom with this Toddler Mermaid Comforter from Pillowfort™. The comforter features a vibrant print of mermaids and seashells to add a dash of whimsical flair to their room. The 100% cotton shell ensures soft, comfortable year-round use, while the cozy comforter with polyester fill adds a layer of warmth to the top of their bed. Add solid sheets and other bedding pieces to complete their bedding ensemble, and machine wash for easy care.
